channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in Go (All-time)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in Go nel periodo all-time.

item.title: 🐹 gin-gonic/gin (88941 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: gin-gonic

📝 Repository: gin-gonic/gin

📄 Descrizione: Gin is a high-performance HTTP web framework written in Go. It provides a Martini-like API but with significantly better performance—up to 40 times faster—thanks to httprouter. Gin is designed for building REST APIs, web applications, and microservices.

⭐ Stelle: 88941

🍴 Forks: 8649

💻 Linguaggio: Go

🏷️ Topics: framework gin go middleware performance router server

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2014-06-16T23:57:25Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-07-22T02:48:15Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 🐹 hashicorp/terraform (49253 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: hashicorp

📝 Repository: hashicorp/terraform

📄 Descrizione: Terraform enables you to safely and predictably create, change, and improve infrastructure. It is a source-available tool that codifies APIs into declarative configuration files that can be shared amongst team members, treated as code, edited, reviewed, and versioned.
